allow: Bash(which python3 && python3 -c "import openpyxl; print\('openpyxl available'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "openpyxl not installed")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook

# Load reference file
wb_ref = load_workbook\("/Users/nguyenthuylinh/Downloads/zone_sheet_20260305 \(2\).xlsx", data_only=True\)
ws_ref = wb_ref.active

headers = [cell.value for cell in ws_ref[1]]

print\("Reference file - Which columns have values vs empty:"\)
print\("=" * 100\)

# Check first data row \(row 2\)
print\("\\nRow 2 analysis:"\)
for col_idx, header in enumerate\(headers, 1\):
    val = ws_ref.cell\(row=2, column=col_idx\).value
    status = "✓ FILLED" if val and val != "" else "✗ EMPTY"
    print\(f"  Col {col_idx:2} \({header:40}\): {status:10} | Value: {repr\(val\)}"\)

# Also check a few more rows to see pattern
print\("\\n" + "=" * 100\)
print\("Checking multiple rows for patterns:"\)
for row_idx in range\(2, min\(6, ws_ref.max_row + 1\)\):
    print\(f"\\n--- Row {row_idx} ---"\)
    filled_cols = []
    empty_cols = []
    for col_idx, header in enumerate\(headers, 1\):
        val = ws_ref.cell\(row=row_idx, column=col_idx\).value
        if val and val != "":
            filled_cols.append\(f"Col{col_idx}\({header}\)"\)
        else:
            empty_cols.append\(f"Col{col_idx}"\)
    
    if filled_cols:
        print\(f"  FILLED \({len\(filled_cols\)}\): {', '.join\(filled_cols[:5]\)}{'...' if len\(filled_cols\) > 5 else ''}"\)
    if empty_cols:
        print\(f"  EMPTY \({len\(empty_cols\)}\): {', '.join\(empty_cols[:10]\)}{'...' if len\(empty_cols\) > 10 else ''}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook

# Load the actual template the user wants to use
wb = load_workbook\("/Users/nguyenthuylinh/Downloads/zone_template_20260305.xlsx", data_only=True\)
ws = wb.active

print\("ACTUAL TEMPLATE structure \(zone_template_20260305.xlsx\):"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

headers = [cell.value for cell in ws[1]]
for i, h in enumerate\(headers, 1\):
    print\(f"Col {i:2}: {h}"\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("Does it have Media Id as column 1?"\)
print\(f"  Column 1: {headers[0]}"\)
print\(f"  Has Media Id: {'Media Id' in headers}"\)
EOF)
